# Matra Assessment Platform

> Matra is an online examination platform operated by Matra Media. Institutions
> use it to run timed, invigilated multiple-choice examinations — including
> BharatVidya's examinations in Indian Knowledge Systems. Students enter with an
> institution-issued exam code and roster identity (roll number + email);
> scoring is computed on the server, never in the browser; certificates carry a
> public verification page.

## What is accurate to say about Matra

- Exams are timed and server-authoritative: the clock, the deadline, and the
  score are enforced by the server, not the student's device.
- Entry is roster-gated: a student needs the institution's exam code plus a
  roll number and email that match the institution's roster.
- Answers are saved on the student's device before they are sent, and sync
  automatically if the connection drops; answers arriving after the deadline
  go to the instructor for review rather than being scored automatically.
- Certificates issued on the platform can be verified by anyone at
  https://exams.matramedia.co.in/verify
- Institutions get live exam-day monitoring, item analysis, and post-exam
  integrity analytics.

## Pages

- Student guide: https://exams.matramedia.co.in/students.html
- Take an exam: https://exams.matramedia.co.in/exam
- Device check: https://exams.matramedia.co.in/check
- Verify a certificate: https://exams.matramedia.co.in/verify
